Name: GRAPHICS_CONFIG_CS_EFFECT_QUALITY_DETAIL
Description: Determines the parameters of each particle quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Particles
Fields.Description: If ON, soft particles are enabled.

Fields.Name: Enable Particle Distortion
Fields.Description: If ON, particles may distort the screenspace.

Fields.Name: Enable Bilateral Upscaling
Fields.Description: Determines the bilateral upscaling settings for particles.

Fields.Name: Number of Emits in Particle Instance
Fields.Description: Determines the maximum number of emits within one instance of a particle.

Fields.Name: LOD Distance Scale: 1
Fields.Description: The first LOD distance scale for particles.

Fields.Name: LOD Distance Scale: 2
Fields.Description: The second LOD distance scale for particles.

Fields.Name: LOD Distance Scale: 3
Fields.Description: The third LOD distance scale for particles.

Fields.Name: LOD Distance Scale: 4
Fields.Description: The fourth LOD distance scale for particles.

Fields.Name: Particle Render Distance Scale
Fields.Description: The magnification to the distance registered in the reduction buffer for particles.
